about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Bookle - Leading Online Bookstore
about.description1: Founded in 1995, Bookle has become one of the most trusted and beloved online bookstores in Vietnam. With over 28 years of experience in publishing and book distribution, we are proud to bring readers quality works from home and abroad.
about.description2: From humble beginnings as a small bookstore in Hanoi, Bookle has now grown into a nationwide distribution system with over 500,000 loyal customers and more than 50,000 diverse book titles.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to bring knowledge to everyone, contributing to building a learning and developing society. We believe that each book contains a wonderful world, and our job is to help you discover those worlds.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: We aspire to become the leading online book platform in Vietnam, where everyone can easily find and own their favorite books. We aim to build a vibrant and growing reading community.

values.title: What Makes Bookle
values.subtitle: Core Values
values.description: These values have accompanied us throughout our 28-year journey

passion.title: Passion for Books
passion.description: We don't just sell books, we nurture a love of literature and knowledge for everyone.

quality.title: Top Quality
quality.description: Each book is carefully selected, ensuring the best content and printing quality.

trust.title: Long-standing Trust
trust.description: With over 28 years of operation, we are proud to be a trusted partner of hundreds of thousands of readers.

service.title: Dedicated Service
service.description: Professional staff, always ready to consult and support customers in the best way.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.description: Nationwide delivery service, ensuring books reach you quickly and safely.

price.title: Reasonable Prices
price.description: Commitment to bring quality books at the best prices on the market.

1995.title: Bookle Founded
1995.description: Started with a small bookstore in Hanoi's Old Quarter, specializing in literature and textbooks.

2005.title: System Expansion
2005.description: Opened 5 more branches in major cities: Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, Hue and Hai Phong.

2015.title: Digital Transformation
2015.description: Launched online bookstore website, marking an important milestone for the company.

2020.title: 500K Customer Milestone
2020.description: Surpassed 500,000 loyal customers and became one of the leading online bookstores.

2023.title: Present & Future
2023.description: Continue to grow with over 50,000 book titles and commitment to bring the best shopping experience to Vietnamese readers.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: With over 28 years of experience, Bookle commits to bringing you high-quality books, reasonable prices and dedicated customer service. We always consider customers as the center and continuously improve to serve you better every day.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Consulting team always ready to assist you
